推荐场景: 酒店/店铺服务台｜表达不满但不失控
60秒任务: 「表达不满」：投诉/政策/要求/方案；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 投诉｜政策｜责任｜要求｜补偿｜解决方案评估
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I understand mistakes happen, but this is frustrating.（克制表达不满）
I’m not satisfied with the service.（明确不满）
This isn’t what I was promised.（指出承诺不符）
I expected ___, but received ___.（对比预期与结果）
The delay has caused a real problem.（说明后果）
I don’t think this is acceptable.（评价不可接受）
Could you explain why this happened?（要求解释）
I’ve had to follow up several times.（说明反复跟进）
I’d like this to be taken seriously.（要求重视）
I’m trying to stay reasonable here.（控制语气）
What can you do to make this right?（要求补救）
I don’t want to escalate this, but I may need to.（表达升级可能）
I appreciate your help, but I need a solution.（礼貌施压）
This has gone on too long.（说明拖延）
Can we resolve this today?（要求当天解决）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: service, promise, delay, expectation, complaint, follow-up, solution, escalation
Verbs: complain, expect, receive, delay, resolve, escalate, follow up, promise
Adjectives / Status: frustrating, unacceptable, reasonable, serious, delayed, unresolved
Time / Place: several times, today, too long, at the counter, over the phone
Chunks: not satisfied, taken seriously, make this right, stay reasonable, resolve this today
